  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

XFE_Frontal_Radar_V8

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 75D
Recv ID: 77D
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 24
Func Name: ACC

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "BOSCH",
    "soft": "R09.10",
    "version": "SW02.0"
  }
]

        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Failures_status_4.V_flag_x_RadarACCBlind": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  }
]
